hero.subtitle: Automate candidate prospecting, evaluation, and interviews. From search to final shortlist, all powered by artificial intelligence.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps to find your ideal candidate

step1.title: Set up your search
step1.desc: Define the role, industry, skills, experience, and configure interview stages. AI handles the rest.

step2.title: AI searches and evaluates
step2.desc: Our AI finds candidates, verifies emails, evaluates CVs and generates industry-validated scoring.

step3.title: AI Avatar interviews
step3.desc: Sofia, our AI avatar, conducts video interviews. Generates detailed scorecards and recommends the final shortlist.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete platform for modern headhunting

prospeccion.title: Automated prospecting
prospeccion.desc: Find candidates and verified emails automatically in your target industry.

coldEmail.title: Smart cold email
coldEmail.desc: Personalized emails sent automatically requesting CVs from ideal candidates.

scoring.title: Validated AI scoring
scoring.desc: Competency-based evaluation with a professional headhunting scoring system.

terna.title: Automated shortlist
terna.desc: AI selects the best candidates and generates a comparative shortlist.

entrevistas.title: Avatar interviews
entrevistas.desc: Sofia, an AI avatar with 12 years of virtual HR experience, interviews candidates on video.

multiEtapa.title: Configurable multi-stage
multiEtapa.desc: Define how many interviews, who participates in each one, and which competencies to evaluate.

cta.title: Ready to find top talent?
cta.subtitle: Set up your first search in under 5 minutes. No credit card required.
